title: Google OAuth credentials fail with JSON error
symptom: When attempting to authorize Google OAuth credentials, the error 'Salted__ is not valid JSON' appears immediately upon clicking 'Sign in with Google'. This occurs across multiple Google services.
applies_when: n8n is running in a beta version
not_this_if: n8n is running in a stable version
root_cause: The error occurs because the OAuth credentials are not being handled correctly in the beta version of n8n. This can lead to issues with the encryption and decryption of the credentials, resulting in invalid JSON errors during the authorization process.
fix_steps: Ensure that n8n is updated to the latest stable version
Avoid using beta versions for production workflows
Retry the OAuth authorization process after the update
agent_instruction: Update n8n to the latest stable version and retry the Google OAuth authorization.
